chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Spl. STRA No.607 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.2336 of 2024 2. For hearing of main case 10.12.2024 Mr. Danyal Shaikh, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Taimur Ali Mirza, Advocate for the Respondent Mr. S. Hussain Shah, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh ************ 1) This is an application under Rule 50 of the Sindh Chief Court Rules [Original Side], whereby, Applicant’s Counsel, namely, Imran Ali Mithani, seeks discharge of his Vakalatnama. Record reflects that prior to this, two Counsel were engaged by the Applicant and finally Mr. Imran Ali Mithani, Advocate was engaged. Mr. Imran Ali Mithani, Advocate in his affidavit has stated that intimation notice has been sent to the Applicant in respect of listed application, but despite this, no other Counsel has been engaged. Accordingly, this application is allowed. Vakalatnama of Mr. Imran Ali Mithani, Advocate stands discharged. 2) Since, no one has been engaged despite above intimation we are left with no choice but to dismiss this Reference Application in non-prosecution. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
